# Build

Builds the project for production deployment.

## Usage

The `build` command can be executed using the following syntax:

<details>
<summary>Using npm:</summary>

```sh
npx powerlines build [options]
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Using yarn:</summary>

```sh
yarn exec powerlines build [options]
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Using pnpm:</summary>

```sh
pnpm exec powerlines build [options]
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>Using bun:</summary>

```sh
bun x powerlines build [options]
```

</details>

The following options are available for the `build` command:
